emails.subject: Why your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] may not be what you think
emails.preview: A root-cause insight most doctors skip
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

When you shared that [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] has been affecting your day-to-day life, it caught our attention — because it's one of the most commonly misunderstood signals the body sends.

Most standard workups only check a handful of markers. At Advanced Functional Medicine, we run over 200 biomarkers specifically designed to uncover what's actually driving symptoms like yours. In many cases, [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] traces back to hormonal imbalance, gut dysfunction, or systemic inflammation — issues that standard care simply doesn't screen for in depth.

That's not a knock on conventional medicine. It's just that conventional medicine is designed for acute care, not for the kind of chronic, root-cause investigation your body is asking for right now.

[KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT] was one of the things your health assessment flagged. That's exactly the kind of signal we investigate further in a consultation.

When you're ready to find out what's actually going on, we're here.

Warm regards,
The Care Team at Advanced Functional Medicine

[BOOKING_LINK]

emails.subject: The 'canary in the coal mine' your body keeps sending
emails.preview: Why symptoms are signals, not the problem
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here's a simple way to think about what may be happening with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM].

Imagine your body as a building. Symptoms are the smoke alarm going off. Standard care often focuses on silencing the alarm — managing symptoms with medication. Functional medicine asks: where's the fire?

For many people dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], the 'fire' is somewhere upstream — a hormonal imbalance, a dysregulated immune response, or a gut lining that's allowing inflammatory signals to circulate. These root causes often don't show up on routine bloodwork because the standard panel simply isn't looking for them.

What we focus on at Advanced Functional Medicine is [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] — investigating the upstream drivers so we can address them directly, not just quiet the alarm.

This approach doesn't come with guarantees, but it does come with a level of thoroughness most patients haven't experienced before.

If that sounds like what you've been looking for, your next step is simple.

Warm regards,
The Care Team at Advanced Functional Medicine

[BOOKING_LINK]

emails.subject: She had the same symptoms. Here's what changed.
emails.preview: An anonymized patient story worth reading
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

One of our patients — a woman in her early 40s — came to us with a symptom pattern very similar to what you described: [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], persistent fatigue, and the frustrating sense that every test came back 'normal.'

After a comprehensive intake and our 200+ biomarker panel, we identified significant hormonal dysregulation and elevated inflammatory markers that hadn't been captured in her prior workups. We built a personalized protocol around her specific results.

Within a few months, she described feeling 'like herself again' for the first time in years — more energy, clearer thinking, and the symptoms that had been disrupting her life had meaningfully improved.

Individual results vary, and we never make promises. But what we can promise is a level of investigation and personalized attention that goes well beyond a 15-minute appointment.

[FIRST_NAME], your health assessment gave us a strong signal that this kind of approach could be meaningful for you. The next step is a no-pressure discovery call to see if we're the right fit.

Warm regards,
The Care Team at Advanced Functional Medicine

[BOOKING_LINK]

app_config.tagline: Find the root cause. Restore your health.

Gut Health: Food sensitivities that seem to be increasing
Thyroid Problems: Cold hands and feet even in warm weather
Thinning eyebrows especially the outer third
Fatigue & Energy: Waking up tired despite 7-8 hours of sleep
Reliance on caffeine to get through the day
Weight Management: Inability to lose weight despite caloric restriction
Weight gain concentrated in the midsection
Hunger that returns quickly after eating
History of thyroid or hormonal issues
Histamine Reactions: Flushing or skin redness after eating
Headaches or migraines triggered by food
Runny nose or nasal congestion not explained by allergies
Hives or itchy skin after certain meals
Heart palpitations after wine or aged cheese
Fatigue or brain fog linked to specific foods
Sensitivity to alcohol especially red wine
Fertility Support: History of miscarriage or difficulty conceiving
Elevated FSH or abnormal hormone panels
Low AMH or diminished ovarian reserve
Cycle irregularities after stopping birth control
Partner with low sperm count or motility

careModels.name: Discovery Call
careModels.desc: A complimentary 20-minute call to discuss your symptoms, goals, and whether AFM is the right fit for you.

careModels.name: Comprehensive Consultation
careModels.desc: Full new-patient intake with detailed health history review, goal setting, and initial lab order selection.

careModels.name: Comprehensive Lab Panel
careModels.desc: 200+ biomarker analysis covering hormones, thyroid, gut markers, metabolic function, and inflammatory indicators.

careModels.name: Personalized Protocol
careModels.desc: Custom plan including dietary guidance, targeted supplementation, lifestyle adjustments, and peptide or hormone therapy as appropriate.
